description: False Colour Composite map depicting a landscape with varied land cover, overlaid with a blue outline representing a Natura 2000 (N2K) Area of Interest (AoI) from 2012 and yellow polygons indicating newly identified N2K areas from 2018. The background satellite imagery shows vegetation in dark red (likely forests) and lighter red/pink tones, agricultural fields and open land in light blue/cyan tones, and a central urbanized area in bright cyan clusters. The blue line delineates the boundary of the N2K AoI as it was in 2012. The scattered yellow polygons highlight areas that were added to the N2K database in 2018 and are located outside the 2012 AoI boundary, illustrating an enlargement of the protected area. A scale bar at the bottom right indicates distances of 0, 1, and 2 km, and a North arrow points upwards.
